zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强延续
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD处于短线震荡上行结构，价格在6.18-6.21窄幅整理，整体重心略有抬升，多头动能温和延续但未形成突破趋势略。

技术指标方面，MACD小幅翻正显示动能改善，均线方面价格稳站SMA20上方，短期结构偏强，但RSI缺失使超买判断有限。

下方支撑关注6.18与6.03附近SMA20区域，上方阻力在6.22及6.35一线，若放量突破6.22或打开进一步上行空间。动能

交易策略建议以回踩低吸为主，6.18上方可轻仓试多，跌破6.03需谨慎观望，短线目标看6.22突破后的延伸行情为宜。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche (AVAX/USD) is currently trading in a tight consolidation phase around 6.20, reflecting low volatility and indecision in the market. Price action remains slightly biased to the upside as it holds above the 20-day simple moving average at 6.03567. Despite the absence of strong directional momentum, the structure suggests gradual stabilization following prior swings, with buyers maintaining marginal control over short-term trend conditions.

MACD reading at 0.0145 indicates mild bullish momentum, though weak and not yet confirmed by a signal line. With RSI unavailable, momentum assessment remains incomplete, but price behavior suggests neutral-to-slightly positive sentiment. The market appears to be in accumulation rather than expansion, with traders awaiting a catalyst for clearer directional bias in either breakout or rejection.

Key support is at 6.1852, with stronger support at the 20-day SMA near 6.03567. Immediate resistance sits at 6.2146, the recent high. A break above this level could target 6.25–6.30, while failure to hold 6.18 may trigger a retest of the SMA. The tight range indicates compression, often preceding increased volatility and directional expansion.

Strategy-wise, range trading is favored between 6.03 and 6.21, buying near support and selling into resistance. Breakout above 6.2146 with confirmation may signal continuation toward higher resistance zones. Conversely, a breakdown below 6.18 weakens structure and risks deeper retracement. Given low volatility, disciplined risk control and tight stops are essential for managing false breakouts.
